steps.title: Eliminate x
steps.content:
Rewrite the equations so the $x$-terms line up.
$$3x+6=4y$$
$$3x+4=2y$$
Subtract the second equation from the first.
$$2=2y$$

steps.title: Calculator shortcut
steps.content: The same value can be checked by graphing both equations and reading the $y$-coordinate of their intersection. The answer is 1.
